work_unit: Full deep audit: skills/runner-exec module (security + correctness)
situation: audit-cycle-state was cycle-complete after audit-2026-07-02-002 (all 18 AS-EC fixes merged). Per protocol, triggered new full audit. Scout-scan ranked skills #1 (score 6.09, missing GATES.md/planning/). Selected runner-exec sub-module for deep audit due to high security sensitivity (credentials, remote PowerShell execution, file push/pull) and no prior audit coverage.
action: Deep audit of runner-exec/scripts/ (7 JS files: batch-write.js, creds.js, exec.js, pull.js, push.js, session.js, write-file.js) via sonnet sub-agent. Found 18 issues (5 high, 6 medium, 5 low, 2 info). Core findings: PowerShell single-quote path injection in 4 files (SK-RE-002~005), execSync shell injection via HOME in creds.js (SK-RE-008), token in WebSocket URL (SK-RE-009), timeout silent resolve (SK-RE-011). Wrote audit report to .claude/audits/audit-2026-07-02-003.md. Updated audit-cycle-state.json: new cycle audit-2026-07-02-003, 14 route-fix pending, 4 structural kept in report only, status→fix-in-progress.
outcome_evidence: audit-2026-07-02-003.md written (18 findings, 5H/6M/5L/2I); audit-cycle-state.json updated: current_audit_id=audit-2026-07-02-003, project=skills, module=runner-exec, 14 pending route-fixes, status=fix-in-progress; history entry appended
next_suggestion: [1] 下轮派生 SK-RE-002 fix (write-file.js PowerShell single-quote escape, priority 1, route-fix) — 注意 skills 项目不在 autonomous-studio 仓库内，需确认 opt-worktree.sh 是否支持跨项目 fix。[2] 若跨项目 fix 不可行，将 SK-RE-002~005 合并为一个 direction-shift 提交到 skills 仓库。[3] 人工处理 4 个 structural findings (SK-RE-001/009/013/016)。

audit_findings.finding: PowerShell single-quote path injection — windowsPath not escaped
PowerShell single-quote path injection on f.path from manifest
PowerShell single-quote path injection on f.winPath/parent
PowerShell single-quote path injection on winDir/winPath
Command injection by design — execOnRunner sends arbitrary command to remote PowerShell
Secret file read without permission check (should be 0600)
pgrep pattern too broad, may match wrong process
audit_findings.remediation: Tighten to exact match or pidfile

audit_findings.finding: execSync shell injection via dbPath (HOME tampering)
Token in WebSocket URL query string (4 locations)
audit_findings.remediation: Send auth via message or header post-open

audit_findings.finding: ws error handler missing clearTimeout — timer leak
audit_findings.remediation: Add clearTimeout + ws.close() in error handler

audit_findings.finding: Timeout silently resolves — caller cannot detect truncation
audit_findings.remediation: Reject or add timeout flag to result

audit_findings.finding: Path traversal via ../ in remote relative path
escapePS duplicated in push.js and write-file.js

audit_findings.remediation: Add queue or reject concurrent exec

audit_findings.finding: Empty catch blocks swallow root cause
